values: Preserve the relationship between CRM accounts, contacts, and commercial opportunities during migration.
160 accounts, 165 contacts, and 51 opportunities normalized from the supplied exports.
external_account_id, external_contact_id, and external_opportunity_id preserve original CRM identity. Do not change them during review.
Contacts join Accounts through external_account_id. Opportunities join both the Account and the primary Contact through their external IDs.

Rateware imports this relational workbook directly: Accounts first, then Contacts and Opportunities linked through external_account_id. Re-importing the same external IDs updates existing records instead of duplicating them.
Complete blank domains when known, validate account ownership, and review opportunity stage mapping before saving into the workspace.
Do not remove external IDs. Duplicate resolution should use domain first, then a manual account review when no domain exists.
